name: Appendix 3
raw_text:
Appendix 3
Italicized spells are reversible. Boldfaced
spells can be found in the Tome of Magic.
SMALL CAPITALIZED spells appear in The
Complete Wizard's Handbook. Underlined
spells are introduced in Appendix 1 of
this book. As mentioned in Chapter 2,
some spells have been reassigned to the
school of universal magic.
